TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_zuomei
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: su'elin kita u ma u malingaday.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin kita u ma u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.
S.FORM: su'elin kita u ma u malingaday.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin kita u ma u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.

TRANSL.notes: 我們農夫阿,真的是(辛苦).

S.TRANSL: 我們農夫阿,真的是 .
We farmers are really hard-working.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw malingad tayni i lutuk.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ tajni i ɾutuk.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw malingad tayni i lutuk.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ tajni i ɾutuk.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人,去山上.
There was a person who went to the mountain.

S.FORM: su'elin mio'ok sa ku 'ayam manengneng nira hay uya tayal aku sa'an lumuwadtu cingra a tayni i umah nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin mio~uʡo~uk sa ku ʡajam manəŋnəŋ nira ħaj uja tajaɾ aku saʡan ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra a tajni i umaħ nira.
S.FORM: su'elin mio'ok sa ku 'ayam manengneng nira hay uya tayal aku sa'an lumuwadtu cingra a tayni i umah nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin mio~uʡo~uk sa ku ʡajam manəŋnəŋ nira ħaj uja tajaɾ aku saʡan ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra a tajni i umaħ nira.
S.TRANSL: 當雞鳴的時候,他想起「啊,我的工作」,他就起身到他的田裡.
When chickens crowed, he thought "ah, my work," and he got up and went to his farm.

S.FORM: naw han adihay ku nipaluma'an nira a kiyafes itini i lutuk nira saka u lalumuwadtu cingra a tayra a miala tunini a kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: naw ħan aɬ~ɮiħaj ku nipaɾumaʡan nira a kijafəs itini i ɾutuk nira saka u ɾaɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra a tajra a miaɾa tunini a kijafəs nira.
S.FORM: naw han adihay ku nipaluma'an nira a kiyafes itini i lutuk nira saka u lalumuwadtu cingra a tayra a miala tunini a kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: naw ħan aɬ~ɮiħaj ku nipaɾumaʡan nira a kijafəs itini i ɾutuk nira saka u ɾaɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra a tajra a miaɾa tunini a kijafəs nira.
S.TRANSL: 他在山上種了很多番石榴,所以他準備去摘這個番石榴.
He grew many guavas in the mountain, so he got up and went to pluck guavas.

S.FORM: su'elin tahirahan nira ccay aca tapangan kuya nipaluma'an nira su'elin a malufic ku haci nira itira ku raheker nu falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin taħiraħan nira ʦʦaj aʦa tapaŋan kuja nipaɾumaʡan nira suʡəɾin a maɾufiʦ ku ħaʦi nira itira ku raħəkər nu faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: su'elin tahirahan nira ccay aca tapangan kuya nipaluma'an nira su'elin a malufic ku haci nira itira ku raheker nu falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin taħiraħan nira ʦʦaj aʦa tapaŋan kuja nipaɾumaʡan nira suʡəɾin a maɾufiʦ ku ħaʦi nira itira ku raħəkər nu faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 真的,他到了之後,只有一棵,他種的樹果實纍纍,他心裡非常滿足.

TRANSL.notes: When he arrived, (he saw) only one tree (what he planted) was fruitful, and he felt satisfied.

S.TRANSL: When he arrived, only one tree was fruitful, and he felt satisfied.

S.FORM: mialatu cingra a pakayakay a miala tu kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: miaɾatu ʦiŋra a pakajakaj a miaɾa tu kijafəs nira.
S.FORM: mialatu cingra a pakayakay a miala tu kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: miaɾatu ʦiŋra a pakajakaj a miaɾa tu kijafəs nira.
S.TRANSL: 他用樓梯開始去摘他的果實.
He took a ladder to pluck guavas.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira tusatu a kiyafes a langa ku kiyafes nira tu ni alaan nira tu haci nuya kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira tusatu a kijafəs a ɾaŋa ku kijafəs nira tu ni aɾaan nira tu ħaʦi nuja kijafəs nira.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira tusatu a kiyafes a langa ku kiyafes nira tu ni alaan nira tu haci nuya kiyafes nira.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira tusatu a kijafəs a ɾaŋa ku kijafəs nira tu ni aɾaan nira tu ħaʦi nuja kijafəs nira.
S.TRANSL: 他看了,他摘的蕃石榴已經裝滿二籃了.
He saw that two baskets were filled with the guavas that he plucked.

S.FORM: kiya ira ku ccay mikitingay tu siri a tamdaw pakayra a mitafsiw.
S.PHON: kija ira ku ʦʦaj mikitiŋaj tu siri a tamɬ~ɮaw pakajra a mitafsiw.
S.FORM: kiya ira ku ccay mikitingay tu siri a tamdaw pakayra a mitafsiw.
S.PHON: kija ira ku ʦʦaj mikitiŋaj tu siri a tamɬ~ɮaw pakajra a mitafsiw.
S.TRANSL: 當時,有一位牽著山羊的人從這裡經過.
Then, a person who pulled a goat along passed.

S.FORM: nikawrira ca'ay ka'anuf kuya pa'acaay tu siri.
S.PHON: nikawrira ʦaʡaj kaʡanuf kuja paʡaʦaaj tu siri.
S.FORM: nikawrira ca'ay ka'anuf kuya pa'acaay tu siri.
S.PHON: nikawrira ʦaʡaj kaʡanuf kuja paʡaʦaaj tu siri.
S.TRANSL: 但是,這個賣山羊的人不貪心.
But the person who sold goats was not greedy.

S.FORM: manengneng nira watah ku haci nira nuna kiyafes sa'an a minengneng mitafsiw tiya mikitingay tu siri.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira wataħ ku ħaʦi nira nuna kijafəs saʡan a minəŋnəŋ mitafsiw tija mikitiŋaj tu siri.
S.FORM: manengneng nira watah ku haci nira nuna kiyafes sa'an a minengneng mitafsiw tiya mikitingay tu siri.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira wataħ ku ħaʦi nira nuna kijafəs saʡan a minəŋnəŋ mitafsiw tija mikitiŋaj tu siri.
S.TRANSL: 他看到果實,番石榴;牽著山羊的人看著經過.

TRANSL.notes: He saw the fruit, the guavas; the person who pulled the goat along passed and saw (the guavas).

S.TRANSL: He saw the fruit, the guavas; the person who pulled the goat along passed and saw .

S.FORM: caho ira kuya pa ka kuliciway a wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u ira kuja pa ka kuɾiʦiwaj a wawa.
S.FORM: caho ira kuya pa ka kuliciway a wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u ira kuja pa ka kuɾiʦiwaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久,有一位騎著單車的小孩.
Before long, there was a child that rode a bike.

S.FORM: unini a wawa su'elin caho ho katu'as u wawa ho kunini a wawa pakayra a mitafsiw.
S.PHON: unini a wawa suʡəɾin ʦaħo~u ħo~u katuʡas u wawa ħo~u kunini a wawa pakajra a mitafsiw.
S.FORM: unini a wawa su'elin caho ho katu'as u wawa ho kunini a wawa pakayra a mitafsiw.
S.PHON: unini a wawa suʡəɾin ʦaħo~u ħo~u katuʡas u wawa ħo~u kunini a wawa pakajra a mitafsiw.
S.TRANSL: 真的,這小孩還沒有長大,從那裡經過.
Really, the child has not grown up; he passed there.

S.FORM: minengneng tu ni alaan nuya malingaday a tamdaw nengnenghan nira tusa a langa watah ku haci nunini a kiyafes sa'an.
S.PHON: minəŋnəŋ tu ni aɾaan nuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw nəŋnəŋħan nira tusa a ɾaŋa wataħ ku ħaʦi nunini a kijafəs saʡan.
S.FORM: minengneng tu ni alaan nuya malingaday a tamdaw nengnenghan nira tusa a langa watah ku haci nunini a kiyafes sa'an.
S.PHON: minəŋnəŋ tu ni aɾaan nuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw nəŋnəŋħan nira tusa a ɾaŋa wataħ ku ħaʦi nunini a kijafəs saʡan.

TRANSL.notes: 他看著那農夫摘的(水果),看到裝滿了兩籃的番石榴.

S.TRANSL: 他看著那農夫摘的 ,看到裝滿了兩籃的番石榴.
He looked at what the farmer plucked and saw two baskets were full of guavas.

S.FORM: alahan nira ku ccay a langa paruhan nira i kuliciw nira na nuya mikuliciw cingra.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa paruħan nira i kuɾiʦiw nira na nuja mikuɾiʦiw ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: alahan nira ku ccay a langa paruhan nira i kuliciw nira na nuya mikuliciw cingra.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa paruħan nira i kuɾiʦiw nira na nuja mikuɾiʦiw ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他拿了一籃,裝在他的單車上,之後他就騎著單車走了.
He took one basket and put it on his bike, and then he rode his bike away.

S.FORM: su'elin ma'anuf ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin maʡanuf ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: su'elin ma'anuf ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin maʡanuf ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他真的很貪心.
He was really greedy.

S.FORM: ta alahan nira a panukay uya a wawa su'elin matalaw ku falucu' nira malalitemuh tu tamdaw su'elin matalaw.
S.PHON: ta aɾaħan nira a panukaj uja a wawa suʡəɾin mataɾaw ku faɾuʦuʡ nira maɾaɾitəmuħ tu tamɬ~ɮaw suʡəɾin mataɾaw.
S.FORM: ta alahan nira a panukay uya a wawa su'elin matalaw ku falucu' nira malalitemuh tu tamdaw su'elin matalaw.
S.PHON: ta aɾaħan nira a panukaj uja a wawa suʡəɾin mataɾaw ku faɾuʦuʡ nira maɾaɾitəmuħ tu tamɬ~ɮaw suʡəɾin mataɾaw.
S.TRANSL: 他拿著帶回家,那個小孩真的很害怕;遇到了人,真的很害怕.

TRANSL.notes: The child took (the basket) home, and was really afraid; he met other people and was really afraid.

S.TRANSL: The child took home, and was really afraid; he met other people and was really afraid.

S.FORM: mapulintu ku pikuliciw nira masasungtul tunini u fikeloh naw han u talaw nira kuraran nitakawan nira.
S.PHON: mapuɾintu ku pikuɾiʦiw nira masasuŋtuɾ tunini u fikəɾo~uħ naw ħan u taɾaw nira kuraran nitakawan nira.
S.FORM: mapulintu ku pikuliciw nira masasungtul tunini u fikeloh naw han u talaw nira kuraran nitakawan nira.
S.PHON: mapuɾintu ku pikuɾiʦiw nira masasuŋtuɾ tunini u fikəɾo~uħ naw ħan u taɾaw nira kuraran nitakawan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他騎著腳踏車就跌倒了,撞到一顆石頭,因為他很害怕.
The bike hit a rock so he fell; this was because he was afraid.

S.FORM: tu nialaan nu malingaday kuranan a mikiyafes saka itira ku talaw nira.
S.PHON: tu niaɾaan nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj kuranan a mikijafəs saka itira ku taɾaw nira.
S.FORM: tu nialaan nu malingaday kuranan a mikiyafes saka itira ku talaw nira.
S.PHON: tu niaɾaan nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj kuranan a mikijafəs saka itira ku taɾaw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他偷走了農夫摘的番石榴,所以他很害怕.
He took the farmer's guavas, so he was afraid.

S.FORM: nikawrira ira kiya tatuluay a tamdaw maaraw nira mapulin kura wawa.
S.PHON: nikawrira ira kija tatuɾuaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maaraw nira mapuɾin kura wawa.
S.FORM: nikawrira ira kiya tatuluay a tamdaw maaraw nira mapulin kura wawa.
S.PHON: nikawrira ira kija tatuɾuaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maaraw nira mapuɾin kura wawa.
S.TRANSL: 但是,有三個人,看到那個小孩跌倒.
But there were three people, they saw the child fall down.

S.FORM: mipadang a mi pudpud tuyanan a kiyafes a miparu tuya kanicaw nira.
S.PHON: mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mi puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tujanan a kijafəs a miparu tuja kaniʦaw nira.
S.FORM: mipadang a mi pudpud tuyanan a kiyafes a miparu tuya kanicaw nira.
S.PHON: mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mi puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tujanan a kijafəs a miparu tuja kaniʦaw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他們去幫忙,撿拾番石榴,裝到他的籃子裡.
They helped him pick up the guavas and put them in his basket.

S.FORM: maharek a miparu pat pataduen nira a pakalic itini i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: maħarək a miparu pat pataɬ~ɮuən nira a pakaɾiʦ itini i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.FORM: maharek a miparu pat pataduen nira a pakalic itini i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: maħarək a miparu pat pataɬ~ɮuən nira a pakaɾiʦ itini i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 裝好以後,他協助他放在他的腳踏車上.
After putting the guavas in the basket, he helped him put the basket on his bike.

S.FORM: iyantu i masa paytemektu tu rakat cangra tahira i fatad nengnenghan nira ira ku kafung nuya wawa tiya kakunkunan nira patiku pafeliho tuya wawa tuya kafung.
S.PHON: ijantu i masa pajtəməktu tu rakat ʦaŋra taħira i fataɬ~ɮ nəŋnəŋħan nira ira ku kafuŋ nuja wawa tija kakunkunan nira patiku pafəɾiħo~u tuja wawa tuja kafuŋ.
S.FORM: iyantu i masa paytemektu tu rakat cangra tahira i fatad nengnenghan nira ira ku kafung nuya wawa tiya kakunkunan nira patiku pafeliho tuya wawa tuya kafung.
S.PHON: ijantu i masa pajtəməktu tu rakat ʦaŋra taħira i fataɬ~ɮ nəŋnəŋħan nira ira ku kafuŋ nuja wawa tija kakunkunan nira patiku pafəɾiħo~u tuja wawa tuja kafuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 之後,他們各自上路,走到半路,看到小孩的帽子在他跌倒的地方,又返回給那個小孩帽子.
Then they walked away separately, and halfway, he saw the child's hat at where the child fell. He went back to gave the hat to the child.

S.FORM: nuya malawacuay mialaay tuya kiyafes.
S.PHON: nuja maɾawaʦuaj miaɾaaj tuja kijafəs.
S.FORM: nuya malawacuay mialaay tuya kiyafes.
S.PHON: nuja maɾawaʦuaj miaɾaaj tuja kijafəs.

TRANSL.notes: (給)那個貪心偷拿番石榴的人.

S.TRANSL: 那個貪心偷拿番石榴的人.

TRANSL.notes: (To) the person who was greedy and took the guavas.

S.TRANSL: the person who was greedy and took the guavas.

S.FORM: su'elin ku falucu' niya tatuluay u fangcalay ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin ku faɾuʦuʡ nija tatuɾuaj u faŋʦaɾaj ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: su'elin ku falucu' niya tatuluay u fangcalay ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: suʡəɾin ku faɾuʦuʡ nija tatuɾuaj u faŋʦaɾaj ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人真的心地很好.
Those three people were really kind.

S.FORM: nikawrira pakayra tiya pi alaan niya malingaday mitafsiw tuya wawa tatuluay manengneng nira kuya tayal niya mama nengnenghan nira cay wata' adihay sa'an tafsiw sa.
S.PHON: nikawrira pakajra tija pi aɾaan nija maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj mitafsiw tuja wawa tatuɾuaj manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tajaɾ nija mama nəŋnəŋħan nira ʦaj wataʡ aɬ~ɮiħaj saʡan tafsiw sa.
S.FORM: nikawrira pakayra tiya pi alaan niya malingaday mitafsiw tuya wawa tatuluay manengneng nira kuya tayal niya mama nengnenghan nira cay wata' adihay sa'an tafsiw sa.
S.PHON: nikawrira pakajra tija pi aɾaan nija maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj mitafsiw tuja wawa tatuɾuaj manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tajaɾ nija mama nəŋnəŋħan nira ʦaj wataʡ aɬ~ɮiħaj saʡan tafsiw sa.

TRANSL.notes: 但是那三個人從那農夫摘水果的地方經過,他(們)看到老人家的工作, 他(們)看了看,「哇!那麼多!」,這麼說,就通過了.

S.TRANSL: 但是那三個人從那農夫摘水果的地方經過,他 看到老人家的工作, 他 看了看,「哇!那麼多!」,這麼說,就通過了.
The three people passed where the farmer plucked fruit and saw the old man's work. They saw and said 'Wow, so many!' and then went past.

S.FORM: uya satu ya malingaday nengnenghan nira ma'pudtu cingra.
S.PHON: uja satu ja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nəŋnəŋħan nira maʡpuɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: uya satu ya malingaday nengnenghan nira ma'pudtu cingra.
S.PHON: uja satu ja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nəŋnəŋħan nira maʡpuɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra.

TRANSL.notes: 那個農夫,他(往下)看,下來了.

S.TRANSL: 那個農夫,他 看,下來了.

TRANSL.notes: The farmer looked (down) and went down.

S.TRANSL: The farmer looked and went down.

S.FORM: miala i fafa'ed ca'aytu kafana' tu kaala nu ta'o tuya ccay a langa.
S.PHON: miaɾa i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦaʡajtu kafanaʡ tu kaaɾa nu taʡo~u tuja ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: miala i fafa'ed ca'aytu kafana' tu kaala nu ta'o tuya ccay a langa.
S.PHON: miaɾa i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦaʡajtu kafanaʡ tu kaaɾa nu taʡo~u tuja ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 他在上面摘,一個籃子被偷走了都不知道.

TRANSL.notes: He was plucking (guavas) above; he didn't know that one basket had been stolen.

S.TRANSL: He was plucking above; he didn't know that one basket had been stolen.

S.FORM: saka matira ma'pud satu cingra nengenghan nira awa'aytu ku ccay a langa mararomtu kuya malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: saka matira maʡpuɬ~ɮ satu ʦiŋra nəŋəŋħan nira awaʡajtu ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa mararo~umtu kuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: saka matira ma'pud satu cingra nengenghan nira awa'aytu ku ccay a langa mararomtu kuya malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: saka matira maʡpuɬ~ɮ satu ʦiŋra nəŋəŋħan nira awaʡajtu ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa mararo~umtu kuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: 所以,他下來,他看到一個籃子不見了,農夫很傷心.
So he went down, and saw one basket was gone. The farmer was sad.

S.FORM: icuwatu kuya ccay a langa aku.
S.PHON: iʦuwatu kuja ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa aku.
S.FORM: icuwatu kuya ccay a langa aku.
S.PHON: iʦuwatu kuja ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa aku.
S.TRANSL: 「我的一個籃子哪去了?」
'Where is one of my baskets?'

S.FORM: tusa a langa kiya patelian aku.
S.PHON: tusa a ɾaŋa kija patəɾian aku.
S.FORM: tusa a langa kiya patelian aku.
S.PHON: tusa a ɾaŋa kija patəɾian aku.
S.TRANSL: 「我明明放了二個籃子.」
'I put two baskets .'

S.FORM: ccayitu ku matumusay sa'an.
S.PHON: ʦʦajitu ku matumusaj saʡan.
S.FORM: ccayitu ku matumusay sa'an.
S.PHON: ʦʦajitu ku matumusaj saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼只有一個籃子裝滿了呢?」
'How come only one basket was full?'

S.FORM: itira ku rarom satu kiya malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: itira ku raro~um satu kija maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: itira ku rarom satu kiya malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: itira ku raro~um satu kija maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: 那時,那個農夫很傷心.
At that time, the farmer was sad.

S.FORM: matira ku malingaday mararom maruray ku falucu'.
S.PHON: matira ku maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj mararo~um maruraj ku faɾuʦuʡ.
S.FORM: matira ku malingaday mararom maruray ku falucu'.
S.PHON: matira ku maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj mararo~um maruraj ku faɾuʦuʡ.
S.TRANSL: 農夫就是這樣,心裡難過又辛勞.
The farmer was like this: he was sad and industrious.
